urdu transliteration text: Ghurbat ki intehaa hai, na saaya na rida hai, Zahra teri lehad paar.
english translation text: It is the peak of loneliness, there is no shade nor a covering on your grave O Zahra

urdu transliteration text: Chand patharon nay mil kaar, mehrooma likh diya hay (x2) Zahra teri lehad paar.
english translation text:
A few stones have gathered and transcribed “Mehrooma”,
on your grave O Zahra

urdu transliteration text:
Teeron bhari qaba thi, aur khoon bhari rida thi (x2)
Cloaks pierced with arrows, Chadors soaked in blood
Jo Shaam say bacha tah Zainab nay rakh diya hai, Zahra teri lehad paar.
english translation text: That which was left from Sham, Zainab has placed, On your grave O Zahra

urdu transliteration text: Do phair dhal rahay hain, khaiyam jaal rahay hain,
english translation text:
Dusk is closing in,
the tents are burning.

urdu transliteration text: Tasveer-e-Karbala ki koyi bana raha hay Zahra teri lehad paar.
english translation text: Someone is drawing a picture of Karbala On your Grave O Zahra

urdu transliteration text: Zindaan ki guthan say, haar laash baykafan say (x2)
english translation text: From the suffering in the prison, pain of unshrouded bodies

urdu transliteration text:
Abid nai jo sambhala, woh aansoo ghir parha hay, Zahra teri lehad paar.
Whatever Abid had restrained, the tears are flowing now
Kayee baar aasmaan nai, sajda adaa keeya hai, Zahra teri lehad paar.
english translation text: The countless times the sky has proferred Sajda, On your grave O Zahra

urdu transliteration text: Khaak-e-Rahay Najaf main jo marsiyah parha hai, Zahra teri lehad paar.
english translation text: When the dust from Najaf recited your lament (Marsiya) On your grave O Zahra

urdu transliteration text: kaun baba ko masaeb me dilasa dega,Ham gareebo ko bhala kaun sahara dega,
english translation text: Who will console our father (Ali) when he cries? Who will assist us after you have passed?

urdu transliteration text: Behre gam kaise safine ko kinara dega,Dhayaan har haal me yun kaun hamara dega,
english translation text: How will a grief-stricken help someone else? Who will support us at every stage?

urdu transliteration text: Abhi nana ki judaee ka alam taza hai,Furqate rehmate konain ka gham taza hai,
english translation text: The pain due to our grandfather’s (SAW) separation is still fresh. The sadness due to Rasulullah’s (SAW) demise is still fresh

urdu transliteration text: Qalbe muztar me ghame shahe umam taza hai, Ab aseero pe falak ka ye sitam taza hai,
english translation text: The grief of the Prophet’s demise is still fresh in our hearts. Alas, now we still have to go through more tribulations

urdu transliteration text:
Sunke muztar ki fugha charkhe kohan kaamp utha, Qalbe konain basad ranj o mehan kaamp utha,
the skies trembled
Qabr e at-har mai Payambar ka badan kaap utha, Kehte kehte shahewala ka sokhan kaamp utha,
english translation text: The Prophet’s (SAW) body trembled from his pure grave

urdu transliteration text:
sunke sarwar ka sokhan bande kafan tut gaya, Ruhe Zehra huee bechain falak kaap gaya,
Hearing Sarwar’s grievances, the shroud tore open… Zahra’s (AS) soul became restless, and the sky trembled
Hath phailake zakiya ne hasan farmaya,Aa gale lagja mere ab na ye kehna beta,
english translation text: Spreading her arms, Fatima (AS) said “O’ my son, please hug me and don’t say this”
